items.name: DSI Project — AI-Powered Data Intelligence Platform
items.summary: Research collaboration with UTS building an end-to-end pipeline that scrapes social media at scale, analyses discourse trends, and republishes AI-tagged content to a third-party platform.
bullets: In collaboration with Prof. Marian Andrei Rizoiu, UTS.
Developed and maintained scrapers targeting major social media platforms to extract content signals, trending keywords, and engagement metrics at scale.
Aggregated and analysed topic trends over time to surface insights into evolving discourse patterns.

Phase 2: integrated with a third-party publishing platform to automate an end-to-end pipeline — ingesting native data, applying AI-driven tagging and categorisation, and republishing enriched content programmatically.

items.name: WV-Tech Phase 2 — GPU Memory Erasure & Integration
items.summary: Extended the data-wiping platform with NVIDIA VRAM erasure, embedding custom GPU drivers into a bootable ISO and validating against IEEE data-erasure standards with external certification partner Viden.
bullets: Researched and implemented VRAM read/write erasure for NVIDIA graphics cards, with dynamic adaptation across different GPU and motherboard vendors.
Embedded pre-configured GPU drivers directly into a custom ISO image for seamless deployment across target hardware environments.
Liaised with external partner Viden — provided technical support for performance testing, IEEE data-erasure standard validation, and formal certification verification.

items.name: Salesforce Developer & Administrator
items.summary: CRM development and administration for UTS Rapido's internal operations — building Apex automations, LWC components, and data integrity systems to support cross-team reporting.
bullets: Implemented bidirectional Grant Type field synchronisation between Opportunity and Campaign objects using Record-Triggered Flows and Global Value Sets.
Built Campaign-Opportunity data integrity systems and resolved relationship issues affecting cross-team reporting pipelines.
Configured SDG multi-select picklist integration, ANZSIC classification fields, and role hierarchy access controls.

items.name: UTS Working Planning Tool
items.summary: Internal staff planning web app built from scratch in React and TypeScript, self-directed into an entirely unfamiliar stack and delivered on schedule.
bullets: Self-directed into web development with no prior experience — spearheaded the build using React and TypeScript from scratch.
Mastered React routing, providers, and component architecture; designed responsive layouts for cross-device compatibility.
Delivered a robust, comprehensive planning tool on schedule despite an entirely unfamiliar stack.

items.name: WV-Tech — Comprehensive Data Wiping Software
items.summary: Cross-platform desktop application for secure hardware data erasure, combining an Electron/React frontend with a Bash backend for BIOS interrogation, hardware reporting, and automated PDF output.
bullets: Led project direction in sync with client needs; guided team to ensure timely milestone delivery.
Built a secure data-wiping backend including BIOS interrogation and battery reporting capabilities.
Designed an intuitive Electron React interface communicating fluidly with the bash backend.
Enabled auto-generation of detailed hardware reports with consolidated PDF output and asset tag removal.

items.name: Quantum Project — Embedded OS & Dev Environment
items.summary: Set up embedded Linux environments on single-board computers (Banana Pi, Raspberry Pi, Radxa CM3) for client TheQ, flashing custom OS images and containerising the development workflow with Docker.
bullets: Client: TheQ. Utilised Banana Pi, Raspberry Pi, and Radxa CM3 chips to flash Ubuntu OS images, enhancing chip functionality.
Established a productive development environment using Docker for streamlined project development and deployment.

items.name: Distributed Processing System
items.summary: Built a distributed processing system over a LAN bridge between master and worker nodes — tasks are split on the master, automatically distributed to workers via Python Celery, and results merged once all jobs complete.
bullets: Contract role contributing to internal software projects across Linux and Python-based tooling.

items.name: Navantia Digital Twin
items.summary: Internship on a defence maritime digital twin project, contributing to architecture simulation for the overall system model.
bullets: Involved in the Navantia Digital Twin project, contributing to architecture simulation for the overall system.
